title: Chief Keef Music Discs
description: Changes all music discs to Chief Keef and a few Gucci man songs. Custom textures included.
body: Tired of the boring vanilla music? Every music disc has been swapped for Chief Keef and a few Gucci Mane songs. Added fade out to songs that were longer than the original music discs and added custom textures for each disc. Turn your realm or single player world into an authentic O-Block 1:1 replica!
